4AM to 8AM: Working through drift ice to NW at slow speed.
0745: Made fast to small floe to fill boiler from water pool.

8AM to Merid: Made several attempts to hold alongside ice floes by means of ice anchors in order to freshen boiler from fresh water pools but were unsuccessful. Drifting to S'd with drift ice. No clear water in sight from crow's nest.
Merid to 4PM: Laying to in closely packed drift ice. Freshening boiler from ice.
4PM to 8PM: Vessel stopped + drifting in ice pack. Slight variable drift.
8PM to Mid: Drifting to S'd throughout watch in slack drift ice.

4AM to 8AM: Laying to in packed drift ice. Hauled floe alongside and took fresh water from pool.

8PM to Mid: Drifting to S'd + E'd in slack drift ice.
0005: Steamed ahead to NW through slack drift ice and skin of new ice.
4AM to 8AM: Working through slack drift ice to the NE.
8AM to Merid: Working under steam, slow speed through slack ice, various courses for Karaga Harbor.
